dna.drivers.entity.title: JDBC Driver Definition
dna.drivers.entity.description: Manages driver download URLs, local uploaded driver jars, and JDBC URL validation rules.
dna.drivers.uploadRequest.description: Driver definition fields used when creating a JDBC driver from an uploaded jar.
dna.drivers.title.name: Driver Name
dna.drivers.description.name: Display name of the driver
dna.drivers.description.code: Unique business code of the driver
dna.drivers.description.databaseType: For example mysql, postgresql, or oracle
dna.drivers.description.version: Version auto-detected from the driver jar
dna.drivers.description.driverClassName: Fully qualified JDBC Driver class auto-detected from the driver jar
dna.drivers.description.downloadUrl: Optional remote URL for downloading the JDBC driver jar; may be empty when uploading manually
dna.drivers.description.jdbcUrlPattern: JDBC URL validation rule inferred from the driver jar
dna.drivers.description.enabled: Whether the driver can be used to build runtime data sources
dna.drivers.description.localJarPath: Local path of the most recently downloaded or uploaded driver
dna.drivers.description.downloadedAt: Time when the driver was most recently downloaded or uploaded successfully
dna.drivers.description.lastDownloadMess: Result message of the latest download or upload
dna.drivers.page.downloadUrl.description: The driver jar will be downloaded automatically when you save. To import a local jar directly, use the Upload Driver button.
dna.drivers.page.importResult.title: Driver Import Completed
dna.drivers.page.modal.createAlert.title: Upload Local Driver Jar
dna.drivers.page.modal.createAlert.descr: After upload, the driver class, version, and JDBC URL pattern are detected automatically. The download URL is optional and can be used for future remote downloads.
dna.drivers.page.modal.replaceAlert.desc: Re-uploading replaces the local driver file and refreshes the detected driver class, version, and JDBC URL pattern automatically.
dna.drivers.page.form.name.label: Driver Name
dna.drivers.page.form.code.label: Driver Code
dna.drivers.page.form.databaseType.label: Database Type
dna.drivers.page.form.downloadUrl.label: Download URL
dna.drivers.page.form.downloadUrl.placeh: Optional, used for future remote downloads
dna.drivers.page.form.description.label: Description
dna.drivers.page.form.enabled.label: Enabled
dna.drivers.page.form.jar.label: Driver Jar
dna.drivers.page.form.jar.dragText: Click or drag a driver jar here to upload
dna.drivers.page.form.jar.hint: Only one JDBC driver jar file is supported
